headline: AT&T Stock’s Bad Week Just Keeps Getting Worse

headline: This Cash-Rich Telecom Anchor Is an Unbeatable Haven for Retirees
summary: When a former Dividend Aristocrat slashes its payout, the market’s memory is long. But four years on, AT&T (NYSE:T) has built a cash flow machine that, in my view, makes its current distribution one of the safer high yields in the large-cap universe. headline: EchoStar's Dish files Chapter 11 after spectrum sale to AT&T is delayed
summary: Dish DBS Corporation and certain of its subsidiaries, including Dish Wireless, on June 30 filed a “prepackaged” Chapter 11 in bankruptcy court in Houston to implement the terms of a previously announced restructuring support agreement (RSA), the company announced. The company is a subsidiary of EchoStar Corp. The filing comes on the heels of “unforeseen delays” in the closing of the company’s $23 billion sale of low-band and mid-band spectrum licenses to AT&T.
